SD Free 32GB Card

01A.product_summary: ROAV by ANKER DASHCAM C1 model R2110 in Black is a dash camera with built-in Wi-Fi, app support, SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor, 1080P 30FPS recording, WDR superior night vision, 145° wide-angle lens, G-Sensor collision detection, illuminated 2.4-inch screen, and a 470mAh Li-polymer battery. Package includes the dashcam, Anker 2-port USB car charger, Micro-USB charging cable, 32GB card, and owner's manual.

02.amazon_product_title: ROAV by ANKER Dash Camera DASHCAM C1 Built In WiFi 1080P Full HD Sony Exmor IMX323 G Sensor WDR Night Vision 145 Degree Wide Angle Black

amazon_bullet_points: CLEAR 1080P RECORDING — Captures Full HD 1080P video at 30FPS with a SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor for detailed everyday driving footage.
ENHANCED NIGHT VISIBILITY — Nighthawk Vision with WDR Superior Night Vision helps capture clearer license plates and road details in low-light conditions.
WIDE ROAD COVERAGE — A 145° wide-angle lens records up to 4 lanes of traffic for broader visibility on the road.
SMART INCIDENT RECORDING — The built-in G-Sensor detects sudden stops or collisions and instantly starts recording when impact is sensed.
EASY APP CONNECTIVITY — Built-in Wi-Fi connects to the Roav Dashcam app so you can review, download, and share videos from your phone.

04.amazon_product_description:
The ROAV by ANKER DASHCAM C1 is a compact dash camera designed for everyday drivers who want clear road recording, dependable incident capture, and convenient video access from their phone. With Full HD 1080P recording at 30FPS and a SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor, it captures detailed driving footage for daily commutes, road trips, and general in-car recording needs.

A 145° wide-angle lens records up to 4 lanes of traffic, helping provide broader road coverage in changing driving conditions. For low-light use, Nighthawk Vision and WDR Superior Night Vision help improve visibility of road details and license plates at night. The built-in G-Sensor is designed to monitor sudden stops or collisions and instantly start recording when impact is detected, supporting safer and more reliable event documentation.

Built-in Wi-Fi and Roav app support make it easy to review, download, and share videos without removing the camera. The illuminated 2.4-inch screen supports on-device viewing, while the included 32GB card helps get recording started right away. With a Novatek NT96658 chipset, F1.8 lens with 6 glass elements, and operating temperatures from 14°F to 149°F, the DASHCAM C1 is built for regular driving use in a range of conditions. The package also includes an ANKER 2-Port USB car charger, Micro-USB charging cable, and owner’s manual.

source_payload.raw_text:
Analyze the below product information.  **Structure and “Lock in” the product data** so we can use it in the next step to build an optimized Amazon listing for this product.

**Product Name:** DASHCAM C1
**Brand:** ROAV by ANKER 
**Color:** Black
**Model:** R2110

**Features and Specifications:** found on actual product label/package
- Built-In Wi-Fi With App Support
- ANKER 2-Port USB Car Charger
- Exmor IMX 323 Advanced SONY Sensor
- FHD 1080P Crystal-Clear Definition
- SD Free 32GB Card
- SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor has Nighthawk Vision™ to clearly capture speeding license plates — especially at night.
- 145° wide-angle view simultaneously records up to 4 lanes of traffic.
- Gravity sensor monitors and instantly starts recording when sudden stops or collisions occur.
- Connect to DashCam's Wi-Fi to seamlessly review, download, and share videos via the Roav app.
- Chipset: Novatek NT96658 
- Wi-Fi: Built-in 
- Sensor: SONY Exmor IMX323 (1/2.9", 2.8µ pixel) 
- Motion Sensor: G-Sensor 
- Video: 1080P 30FPS (1920×1080) 
- Night Vision: WDR Superior Night Vision 
- Operating Temperatures: 14°F to 149°F 
- Screen: Illuminated 2.4" 
- Screen Lens: F1.8 with 6 high-quality glass elements and 145° viewing angle 
- Battery: 470mAh Li-polymer battery capable of operating in high and low temperatures.
- Download the Roav Dashcam app from the App Store or Google Play.

**Box Contents:**
- DashCam C1
- Anker 2-Port USB car charger
- Micro-USB charging cable
- 32GB card
- Owner's Manual
